requirement_topic.en: ICES Interference-Causing Equipment — digital apparatus emissions
requirement_topic.zh: ICES干扰设备 — 数字设备发射
requirement_topic.zht: ICES干擾設備 — 數位設備發射

summary.en: Digital apparatus and other interference-causing equipment marketed in Canada must comply with applicable ISED ICES standards. Wireless and IoT products commonly include unintentional digital circuitry in addition to intentional radio transmitters, so ICES compliance may be required alongside RSS radio certification.
summary.zh: 在加拿大销售的数字设备及其他干扰设备必须符合适用的ISED ICES标准。无线和物联网产品通常除有意无线发射器外还包含无意数字电路，因此可能需要在RSS无线电认证之外同时满足ICES要求。
summary.zht: 在加拿大銷售的數位設備及其他干擾設備必須符合適用的ISED ICES標準。無線和物聯網產品通常除有意無線發射器外還包含無意數位電路，因此可能需要在RSS無線電認證之外同時滿足ICES要求。

standards_or_laws: ISED ICES-003 — Information Technology Equipment including Digital Apparatus

summary.en: China EMC testing may be performed under CCC or voluntary standards depending on the product type. These reports are based on Chinese requirements and are not Canadian ICES declarations or Canadian-market interference compliance evidence unless the test scope and limits are specifically mapped and accepted.
summary.zh: 中国EMC测试可能依据产品类型纳入CCC或按自愿标准执行。这些报告基于中国要求，除非测试范围和限值经过专门映射并被接受，否则不是加拿大ICES声明或加拿大市场干扰合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國EMC測試可能依據產品類型納入CCC或按自願標準執行。這些報告基於中國要求，除非測試範圍和限值經過專門映射並被接受，否則不是加拿大ICES聲明或加拿大市場干擾合規證據。

standards_or_laws: China CCC EMC requirements where applicable
GB/T or GB EMC standards for information technology and multimedia equipment

gap.en: Canadian ICES obligations are often missed when teams focus only on the intentional transmitter. The exporter should classify the product as interference-causing equipment where applicable, prepare ICES test evidence, and ensure the Canadian interference statement and class designation are reflected in documentation.
gap.zh: 企业只关注有意发射器时，常会遗漏加拿大ICES义务。出口商应在适用时将产品归类为干扰设备，准备ICES测试证据，并确保加拿大干扰声明和等级分类体现在文件中。
gap.zht: 企業只關注有意發射器時，常會遺漏加拿大ICES義務。出口商應在適用時將產品歸類為干擾設備，準備ICES測試證據，並確保加拿大干擾聲明和等級分類體現在文件中。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — applicable ICES requirements for interference-causing equipment marketed in Canada
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where covered by CCC or other Chinese EMC rules; otherwise product-dependent

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ICES is separate from RSS radio certification. A Wi-Fi or Bluetooth IoT device may need both Canadian radio approval and Canadian digital-apparatus interference compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】ICES与RSS无线电认证相互独立。Wi-Fi或蓝牙物联网设备可能同时需要加拿大无线电批准和加拿大数字设备干扰合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】ICES與RSS無線電認證相互獨立。Wi-Fi或藍牙物聯網裝置可能同時需要加拿大無線電批准和加拿大數位設備干擾合規。

source.publisher: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada
